text.title: Design Patterns Overview Decision Tree
text.summary: Routing tree mapping observable signals to a rule from content/01-core-rules.xml. The skip-this-methodology branch is always reachable.

decision-tree.root-question: Is a concrete symptom documented with measurable signals?

text.example: Symptom: HTTP client to billing API fails intermittently (5% errors). Shortlist: Retry, Circuit Breaker, Bulkhead. Fit/cost: Circuit Breaker 4/2, Retry 3/2, Bulkhead 3/4. Selection: Circuit Breaker. Rejected: Bulkhead (no thread-pool isolation needed), Retry alone (does not stop cascade). ADR-PAT-021 Accepted, review trigger = circuit-open events < 5 / 30 days.
